assertions.assertion: The code uses .WithReplicas(3) on the IdentityServer project resource
The response mentions shared signing keys (ISigningKeyStore or equivalent) as a requirement
assertions.rationale: Response does not specifically mention signing keys or ISigningKeyStore. It mentions 'configuration and operational data' generically but not signing keys specifically.

assertions.assertion: The response mentions shared ASP.NET Data Protection keys as a requirement
assertions.rationale: Response mentions Data Protection keys must be shared across instances

assertions.assertion: The response mentions shared operational store (persisted grants, device codes, or server-side sessions) as a requirement
assertions.rationale: Response mentions session state in shared location and shared database for operational data and grants

assertions.assertion: The response warns against using file-based signing keys or in-memory stores with multiple replicas
assertions.rationale: Response does not warn against file-based signing keys or in-memory stores
